Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Tested: How Many Times Can a DVD±RW Be Rewritten? Methodology and Results 27 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. Physicist Astrid Eichhorn is a leader in the field of asymptotic safety 112 upvotes, 16 comments
  3. Against vibes: When is a generative model useful 48 upvotes, 5 comments
  4. Show HN: s@: decentralized social networking over static sites 35 upvotes, 3 comments
  5. CNN Explainer – Learn Convolutional Neural Network in Your Browser (2020) 26 upvotes, 2 comments
  6. Show HN: I built a tool that watches webpages and exposes changes as RSS 175 upvotes, 46 comments
  7. Don't post generated/AI-edited comments. HN is for conversation between humans 2852 upvotes, 1047 comments
  8. Temporal: A nine-year journey to fix time in JavaScript 540 upvotes, 182 comments
  9. Many SWE-bench-Passing PRs would not be merged 149 upvotes, 44 comments
  10. Making WebAssembly a first-class language on the Web 412 upvotes, 148 comments
  11. Show HN: Autoresearch@home 41 upvotes, 10 comments
  12. How we hacked McKinsey's AI platform 397 upvotes, 165 comments
  13. Apple releases iOS 15.8.7 to fix Coruna exploit for iPhone 6S from 2015 48 upvotes, 14 comments
  14. How much of HN is AI? 47 upvotes, 14 comments
  15. BitNet: 100B Param 1-Bit model for local CPUs 307 upvotes, 151 comments
  16. Challenging the Single-Responsibility Principle 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  17. Urea prices 39 upvotes, 14 comments
  18. 5,200 holes carved into a Peruvian mountain left by an ancient economy 99 upvotes, 50 comments
  19. Show HN: Klaus – OpenClaw on a VM, batteries included 118 upvotes, 68 comments
  20. Google closes deal to acquire Wiz 240 upvotes, 159 comments
  21. Entities enabling scientific fraud at scale (2025) 263 upvotes, 187 comments
  22. Show HN: A context-aware permission guard for Claude Code 39 upvotes, 25 comments
  23. Personal Computer by Perplexity 116 upvotes, 102 comments
  24. Britain is ejecting hereditary nobles from Parliament after 700 years 176 upvotes, 169 comments
  25. Preliminary data from a longitudinal AI impact study 32 upvotes, 24 comments
  26. I was interviewed by an AI bot for a job 158 upvotes, 167 comments
  27. Atlassian to cut roughly 1,600 jobs in pivot to AI 110 upvotes, 152 comments
  28. The MacBook Neo 410 upvotes, 699 comments
  29. Swiss e-voting pilot can't count 2,048 ballots after decryption failure 157 upvotes, 362 comments
  30. Meticulous (YC S21) is hiring to redefine software dev 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 10:30am, 12 March 2026. Source here.
